docket_entries.description: THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-11-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). PLAINTIFF ELAINE NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $163.91 ACCRUED INTEREST, $25.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE
ORDER RE: MOTION OFF CALENDAR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $135.00) SERVED FEB-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ELAINE NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 03/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER = NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED = UNABLE TO FORWARD."
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6-11-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY NGUYEN, ELAINE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUCHAFRA, HAMZA $3,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,835.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT'S MASTER TENANCY WAS NOT PROPER AND THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO A RETURN OF A PORTION OF RENT AND HER SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, ELAINE
